Building Applied Innovation

TSB Enterprise is the U.S.-based umbrella company behind Uptarget and several breakthrough technology ventures — combining scientific depth, entrepreneurial drive, and real-world impact, from custom software to smart platforms.

Targeted Solutions for Business

About

Targeted Solutions for Business is the U.S.-based umbrella company behind Uptarget.Co and several breakthrough technology ventures.

Founded by Dr. Olena Vlasiuk, TSB is a corporation that operates and invests in software services and next-generation technology platforms.

With a foundation in science and business, we build solutions that address critical challenges in automation, accessibility, and digital transformation.

Dr. Olena Vlasiuk

CEO

Roman Vlasiuk

CTO

Projects

Uptarget.co

Remote software development teams.

A profitable service business with 30+ engineers supporting startups in the U.S., Israel, and Europe.

Owl Solutions

Automation for greenhouses, energy, and industrial sensors.

A powerful platform for automating your assets, from a single device to a global network.

coming soon

Dynamic UI Bridge

Visual dashboard builder powered by API-driven metadata.

Helps SMBs and civic orgs build forms and reports without code.

pilot phase

Real-Time Speech Translation Tool

Break the Language Barrier

Real-time language bridging infrastructure for live, broadcast, and multilingual environments with millisecond latency.
